Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: gx_default, Default, Default; gx_curl_up, CurlUp, Curl Up (iOS Only); gx_curl_down, CurlDown, Curl Down (iOS Only); gx_flip_from_left, FlipFromLeft, Flip From Left (iOS only); gx_flip_from_right, FlipFromRight, Flip From Right (iOS only); gx_slide_down, SlideDown, Slide Down; gx_slide_up, SlideUp, Slide Up; gx_slide_left, SlideLeft, Slide Left; gx_slide_right, SlideRight, Slide Right; gx_push_down, PushDown, Push Down; gx_push_up, PushUp, Push Up; gx_push_left, PushLeft, Push Left; gx_push_right, PushRight, Push Right; gx_fade, Fade, Fade; gx_none, None, None
